name: Accomplice
overview: A live-action web-survival show based on Mafia 42, which is famous for mafia games, and it is a mystery game in which 10 participants live together with a prize of 100 million won and cause a fierce brain fight.

trailers.title: 상금1억. 매일 밤 살인이 일어나는 마피아게임 | 공범 EP1 [ENG/JP]
